bme_mem_seg_info Struct Reference
[Bare Metal Environment APIs]

Mapping information for a segment of memory. More...


Data Fields

PA base_pa
 Base physical address of this segment.
VA base_va
 Base virtual address of this segment.
uint32_t size
 Length of this segment, in bytes.
int cache_mode
 Caching mode.
pos_t cache_coords
 Coordinates of tile on which this is cached, if cache_mode is BME_CACHE_MODE_COORDS.
bme_seg_type_t seg_type
 Type of segment.
int itlb_index
 Index in the ITLB, -1 if not in ITLB.
int dtlb_index
 Index in the DTLB, -1 if not in DTLB.

Detailed Description

Mapping information for a segment of memory.

Field Documentation

PA bme_mem_seg_info::base_pa

Base physical address of this segment.

VA bme_mem_seg_info::base_va

Base virtual address of this segment.

uint32_t bme_mem_seg_info::size

Length of this segment, in bytes.

int bme_mem_seg_info::cache_mode

Caching mode.

pos_t bme_mem_seg_info::cache_coords

Coordinates of tile on which this is cached, if cache_mode is BME_CACHE_MODE_COORDS.

bme_seg_type_t bme_mem_seg_info::seg_type

Type of segment.

int bme_mem_seg_info::itlb_index

Index in the ITLB, -1 if not in ITLB.

int bme_mem_seg_info::dtlb_index

Index in the DTLB, -1 if not in DTLB.
